title: A surprising and most welcomed side effect of tamoxifen.
body:
I was diagnosed with hormone positive cancer last year at the age of 35. It was a horrible journey as we all well know. I was really struggling with the idea of having to take Tamoxifen and putting my body through its horrible side effects. I had also been suffering with Candida for years. I had chronic thrush, I had to treat it once a week and it would always come back with a vengeance and more severe. I tried everything: completely cutting out sugar, probiotics, fermenting, prescription medication etc etc. It was really getting me down and making me feel generally awful. I put off taking Tamoxifen for a little while, because I just wanted to have a little bit of time of feeling normal.

 I finally took the plunge and began the treatment. It made me quite moody at first and I got quite upset about the idea of feeling like this for ten years. A few days later I noticed that my thrush had cleared up. I couldn’t believe it. It still has not returned and I feel amazing. The only thing I had done differently was start taking Tamoxifen. I googled tamoxifen and anti fungal properties and low and behold there’s a load of research papers about using it as an anti fungal. I’ve been suffering with Candida for years and I’ve also heard there being a connection between Candida causing cancer. So as you can imagine, I’m over the moon and enjoying my new found freedom from Candida. You’ve got to celebrate these silver linings haven’t you! :)
